arts.ttl: Arteta insists it is ‘time’ to give Arsenal star more minutes
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said it is ‘time’ he handed Raheem Sterling more minutes at Arsenal. Sterling has struggled for a regular role since signing on loan from Chelsea in the summer, with the winger restricted to just 340 minutes across nine appearances in all competitions. arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta says Arsenal need to be near-perfect to catch leaders Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners, who travel to West Ham on Saturday, head into the weekend fourth in the table and nine points off the pace.

arts.ttl: West Ham enquire about signing title winner striker on loan
arts.sum: West Ham United are currently 14th in the Premier League and struggling to get goals from their strikers. The Hammers spent heavily in the summer transfer window on their squad and strengthened all the positions. arts.ttl: “We fought for each other” | West Ham manager reacts to Newcastle performance
arts.sum: West Ham head coach Julen Lopetegui was pleased to see his side put in a performance to be counted on Monday evening against Newcastle at St James Park. arts.ttl: Arteta says ‘energy’ lifted at Arsenal amid recent form
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has said the energy has been lifted at Arsenal following his side’s return to form. Having gone four games without a win before the international break, Arsenal have returned with convincing victories over Nottingham Forest and Sporting Lisbon. arts.ttl: Why Mikel Arteta could now cost Arsenal ‘unreal’ world-class transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal, to their credit, aren’t exactly desperate for offensive reinforcements on the wings. The loan signing of Raheem Sterling from Chelsea (yet another Manchester City cast-off to have wound his way to the Emirates Stadium) certainly provides much-needed cover in that department. arts.ttl: Arsenal 'open' to January transfer for defender 'who can become one of the best in Europe'
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly open to allowing Jakub Kiwior to leave the club on loan once the winter transfer window opens in January. Several sides in Italy were said to be interested in Kiwior, who Arsenal signed from Spezia.

arts.ttl: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta gives cryptic update on Gabriel injury before West Ham clash
arts.sum: Arsenal travel across London to play West Ham in the Premier League on Saturday evening and could be without key centre-back Gabriel Magalhaes, who was forced off vs Sporting

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel sparks Alan Shearer and Micah Richards argument - 'A load of s***'
arts.sum: Arsenal's Gabriel Magalhaes stirred controversy by ironically performing Viktor Gyokeres' own celebration after scoring against Sporting CP, sparking a debate between Alan Shearer and Micah Richards

arts.ttl: West Ham, Crystal Palace and Brighton ‘could quickly go on offensive’ for Lille player – Transfer on the way
arts.sum: Lille’s Ngal’ayel Mukau has ended up on the radar of West Ham United, Crystal Palace and Brighton & Hove Albion. The 20-year-old joined the Ligue 1 side from Belgian side KV Mechelen in the summer and signed a deal until 2028.
